_comment: EVERY global tunable lives here (design pillar #2). Game hot-reloads this file in dev. Values documented in WEB_GAME_ROADMAP.md are marked; the rest are PLACEHOLDER pending CLAUDE.md verification.

autonomy._source: seek/stop from roadmap §2; cooldown PLACEHOLDER — verify vs CLAUDE.md

time._source: 60 s/day is the Unreal DEBUG speed — open decision #2, retune in Phase 1

map._source: which data/maps/<active>.json the game plays; set from the Map Editor "Play this map" button

quests._source: Quest system slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §3) — toast on-screen time and how many completed quests the HUD log keeps.

interaction._source: Asset facing slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.2). useSpotClearance = gap beyond an asset's footprint edge for a front-approach stand point; seatViewDistance = how far in front of a seat-aware target (e.g. the TV) the viewing point sits when ranking candidate seats — ports the Unreal prototype's RightVector*400 (~4m) at a web-appropriate scale.

doors._source: Doors-as-assets slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.1). Defaults for AssetDef.door fields a door instance doesn't override. 0.5s open/close is the designer's requested default; triggerDistance is meters (map gridSize=1 → 1 grid unit = 1m), sized so the door swings open a beat before the sim (walkSpeed 2 m/s) reaches it.

marker._source: Overhead marker slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.7, Sims plumbob reference). Edit through tools/animations.html's Overhead marker section. Blank mesh = the built-in green octahedron; point it at a .glb or an image (png/jpg/webp/gif billboard) to override. Tuned against heightMeters 1.55: yOffset clears a real head, scale keeps a modest ~0.3m marker, spin/bob read as a gentle idle.

character._source: edit this block through tools/animations.html (Animation Mapper): it lists the GLB's actual clips, previews them in 3D, and maps them to states. animationPaths = extra GLBs whose clips are merged in (Mixamo one-clip-per-file exports, same skeleton). sitHeight/lieHeight replace the old hardcoded 0.25/0.55. Missing/failed GLB keeps the capsule stand-in.

camera._source: PLACEHOLDER — clamps to be tuned against Sims reference screenshots
